subcodes.first_line: The melodies of God have been raised in this Paradise which hath been known by His Name. Say: Verily, Paradise hath [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ارتفعت نغمات الله فی هذا الفردوس الذی کان باسمه معروفا قل ان الفردوس قد
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement
